scripts.precucumber: rimraf reports && mkdir reports && echo {} > reports/report.json
scripts.cucumber:DEV: cross-env COMMON_CONFIG_FILE=env/common.env NODE_ENV=DEV npm run transpile && cross-env COMMON_CONFIG_FILE=env/common.env NODE_ENV=DEV cucumber-js
scripts.cucumber:QAS: cross-env COMMON_CONFIG_FILE=env/common.env NODE_ENV=QAS npm run transpile && cross-env COMMON_CONFIG_FILE=env/common.env NODE_ENV=QAS cucumber-js
scripts.cucumber:PRD: cross-env COMMON_CONFIG_FILE=env/common.env NODE_ENV=PRD npm run transpile && cross-env COMMON_CONFIG_FILE=env/common.env NODE_ENV=PRD cucumber-js
